xwikidoc.name: SecurityAdvisoryApplicationTranslations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
# Class fields SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status=상태 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_draft=초안 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_completed=완전한 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_announced=발표됨 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_disclosed=공개 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_title1=제목 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_title_hint=권고의 제목 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_product=제품 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_product_hint=영향을 받은 제품(예: xwiki-platform, xwiki-rendering, application-change-request 등) SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_advisoryLink=자문 링크 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_advisoryLink_hint=생성된 github 권고사항 링크 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_computeEmbargo=금수조치를 계산하다 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_computeEmbargo_hint=엠바고 날짜가 버전에서 자동으로 계산되어야 하는지 여부를 정의합니다. SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_embargoDate=금수조치 날짜 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_embargoDate_hint=특정 수출 금지 날짜를 정의하세요. 이는 수출 금지 날짜 계산 플래그가 선택되지 않은 경우에만 고려됩니다. SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvss=CVSS 점수 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvss_hint=문자열 형식으로 계산된 CVSS의 값입니다. ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvssScore=CVSS Score ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvssScore_hint=Score corresponding to the CVSS vector. SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_description=설명 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_description_hint=권고의 전체 내용. ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_preventOverride=Prevent override ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_preventOverride_hint=Check to prevent overriding data in case of Github import. ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_ecosystem=Ecosystem ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_ecosystem_hint=Package ecosystem for the vulnerable package (e.g. Maven or NPM) ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_packageId=Package Identifier ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_packageId_hint=Identifier of the vulnerable package ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_vulnerableVersionRange=Vulnerable versions range ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_vulnerableVersionRange_hint=Range of versions of the given package that are affected by the vulnerability ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_patchedVersions=Patched versions ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_patchedVersions_hint=List of versions of the given package that have been patched
# Sheet keys securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.description=이 페이지는 보기 및 편집 모드 모두에서 보안 권고 응용 프로그램 페이지가 표시되는 방식을 제어합니다. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.noObject=현재 페이지에는 예상되는 보안 권고 응용 프로그램 개체가 없습니다. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.noFields=보안 권고 애플리케이션 애플리케이션에는 표시할 필드가 없습니다.
# Live table generic keys securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.title=페이지 제목 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.name=페이지 이름 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.space=공간 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.fullname=페이지 전체 이름 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.location=위치 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.author=마지막 저자 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.creator=창조자 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.date=날짜 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.creationDate=생산 일 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._avatar=화신 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._images=이미지 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._attachments=첨부파일 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._actions=행위 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._actions.edit=편집하다 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._actions.delete=삭제 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.emptyvalue=-
# Live table specific keys securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.status=상태 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.title1=제목 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.product=제품 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.mavenModules=메이븐 모듈 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.affectedVersions=영향을 받는 버전 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.patchedVersions=패치된 버전 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.advisoryLink=자문 링크 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.jiraTickets=지라 티켓 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.computeEmbargo=금수조치를 계산하다 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.embargoDate=금수조치 날짜 securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.cvss=CVSS 점수 ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.cvssScore=CVSS Score securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.description=설명
# Other keys securityadvisoryapplication.entry.name=보안 권고 신청 securityadvisoryapplication.home.right.warning={0}보안 진입 공간{1}은 현재 모든 사용자에게 열려 있으므로 액세스를 제한해야 합니다.
# Configuration SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_embargoDurationUnit=엠바고 계산에 사용되는 기간의 단위 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_embargoDurationUnit.hint=단위는 ChronoUnit 값(예: 분, 시간, 일, 주, 월 등)을 기반으로 합니다 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_defaultEmbargoDuration=엠바고 계산에 사용할 기간 값 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_defaultEmbargoDuration.hint=해당 단위로 계산된 이 값은 권고 발행물의 최신 패치 릴리스 날짜에 추가됩니다 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_securityGroup=권고 알림 대상 사용자 그룹 SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_securityGroup.hint=이 그룹의 사용자는 권고를 게시할 준비가 되면 자동으로 알림을 받게 됩니다. ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_dataSpace=Security entries space location ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_dataSpace.hint=The reference of the space where to store security entries (default: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.SecurityEntries) ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_importerUser=Importer user ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_importerUser.hint=The user used as author for imported entries ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubToken=Github Token ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubToken.hint=The Github token to use for importing security advisories ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubRepositoriesSlug=Github Repositories ### Missing: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubRepositoriesSlug.hint=The list of Github repositories to use in automatic import. The value can be a repository slug in the form orga/repo (e.g. xwiki/xwiki-platform) or it can be an organization (e.g. xwiki).
# Administration - configuration and data migration ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.settings.heading=Configuration ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.heading=Data migration ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.description=Migrate existing security advisories to the new data model: the impacted packages are moved to dedicated objects and the CVE identifier is migrated. The migration runs as a background job and is safe to run multiple times. ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.candidates=Advisories still using the legacy data model: {0} ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.button=Migrate advisories ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.finish.success=The security advisories have been successfully migrated to the new data model. ### Missing: securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.finish.error=An error occurred while migrating some security advisories. See the log below for details. ### Missing: job.log.label.securityadvisory.datamigration=Migration log
# Sheet Explanations securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.DRAFT=현재 권고 초안을 편집 중입니다. 완료되면 페이지 상단의 버튼을 사용하여 완료로 표시할 수 있습니다. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.COMPLETED=이제 권고가 완료되었으므로 보안 정책에 정의된 전용 채널에 이를 공지해야 합니다. 권고가 발표되면 페이지 상단에 있는 버튼을 사용하여 상태를 전환할 수 있습니다. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.ANNOUNCED=이 권고가 발표되었습니다. 수출 금지 날짜에 도달하면 자동으로 공개 가능으로 표시됩니다. 패치된 버전이 아직 출시되지 않은 경우 엠바고 날짜가 아직 계산되지 않았을 수 있습니다. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.DISCLOSABLE=이제 이 권고는 금수 조치 날짜에 따라 공개될 수 있습니다. CVE를 요청하고 게시해야 합니다. 완료되면 페이지 상단의 버튼을 사용하여 공개로 표시해야 합니다. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.DISCLOSED=이 권고는 공개되었으며 현재 공개되었습니다. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.severity=심각성
# Deprecated keys securityadvisoryapplication.dataSpace.title=데이터
